subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the wine of the love of the All-Glorious! Majnún of Laylí declareth: "Verily, all my kindred did censure me for my love of her..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست باده عشق ذی الجلال مجنون لیلی میگوید لقد لامنی فی حبها کل اقاربی ابی
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @pain of love; love as veil
